responses.open_text: Love the speed and clean UI. The only thing I miss is a Gantt view for longer projects.
The onboarding is confusing. I spent two days trying to understand how to set up projects correctly and gave up twice.
Really good tool for solo work. Gets harder when your team has 10+ people — too many notifications and no way to silence specific projects.
Works well for most things. I wish the mobile app was better — it feels like an afterthought compared to the web version.
Best project tool I have used in 10 years. The recurring tasks feature saved us probably 2 hours per week.
We signed up as a team of 15 and about half the people still use a spreadsheet. The learning curve is too steep for non-technical folks.
Love it but please add Microsoft Teams integration. Our company is all-in on Teams and Slack is not an option.
Good features but performance is an issue — the dashboard takes about 4 seconds to load when I have many projects.
Switched from Asana and have not looked back. The recurring tasks alone paid for the subscription.
I like the concept but the CSV export does not include all fields. We have to manually copy some things over to our reports.
Solid product. Would love bulk editing of tasks — right now you have to update one by one which is painful for large projects.
The search function is terrible. I cannot find tasks from 3 months ago without scrolling through everything.
Excellent support team. Had an issue and it was resolved within an hour. The product itself is intuitive once you get it.
Good tool but the pricing is too high for small teams. Would love a cheaper tier for 2-5 person startups.
The task dependencies feature is underrated. Once we set those up, our team stopped missing handoffs.

question: What is the main thing you would like us to improve or add?
